title: Vampirism Dark Mode
description: 🌙 Vampirism Mod Support Resource Pack for Default Dark Mode
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1f69b3bb28a92d610b0d91da412849934440794.png) #

Vampirism Support Pack for Default Dark Mode

Vampirism Dark Mode is a compatibility recource pack for [**Default Dark Mode**]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)) and [**Vampirism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) and its addons. It was based on [Dark Mode for Vampirism GUIs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-mode-for-vampirism-guis) pack by XxKidDowdallxX, but improved and changed to support Minecraft 1.21+. Some of the icon textures are completely new, some have been fixed, and some have been given a darker hue than their predecessors. If you have any recommendations, you can join the Discord server and submit them there. ## Supported Mods In addition to **Vampirism**, it also supports its addons such as **Werewolves** and **Vampire's Delight**. ## Compatibility The pack is compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and above. ## Screenshots ![Vampirism Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad9dbbc61eaadb0f61518ba57224f3d03bab5b1_0.webp) ![Skill Configuration Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72b422edf66c2d969f7be857538742eaeca9894_0.webp) ![Skill Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec210ca94bb7e8ac5c02489ff9fbd56393bbe72.png) ![Hunter Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d94b924a6c742527fb6a50503a6edba3762e0ba_0.webp)
